recent_basis: Recent mover lists use custom rating changes versus the 2026-03-27 snapshot, which is the day before the weighted-median 10th most recent team game. Skater movers use overall talent score, team movers use total team score, goalie movers use goalie score, and usage lists compare the most recent 10 games to the previous 10.

today_games.top_deciding_factors: goalie adjustment edge (-0.692); depth-under-injury edge (+0.565); recent point/cycle edge (+0.444); delta-V depth-under-injury edge (-0.321); skellam win probability (+0.318)
today_games.home_factor_pushes: depth-under-injury edge (+0.565); recent point/cycle edge (+0.444); skellam win probability (+0.318); base win probability (+0.265); depth-score under-injury edge (+0.244)
today_games.away_factor_pushes: goalie adjustment edge (-0.692); delta-V depth-under-injury edge (-0.321); special-teams RAPM edge (-0.209); garbage-time stat inflation edge (-0.201); recent talent trend edge (-0.199)
